author: Klar
text:
This portfolio template is designed for creative professionals who want a bold, editorial-feeling presence on the web. Built with semantic HTML, CSS custom properties, and vanilla JavaScript, it requires no framework or build step — just open it in a browser or drop it into your hosting of choice.

The layout follows a single-page flow: a full-height hero, an animated marquee, an about section with stats, a capabilities list, a featured-plus-grid work showcase, testimonials, and a contact form. Every section is responsive and reflows cleanly on mobile.

  • Dark & light themes — a toggle in the nav switches themes instantly; the preference is saved to localStorage.
  • Scroll-reveal animations — powered by IntersectionObserver, elements fade and rise into view as you scroll.
  • Scroll progress bar — a thin gradient bar at the top of the page tracks reading position.
  • Editorial typography — Sora for UI text and Instrument Serif italics for accents give headings a magazine-quality feel.
  • Editable in Klar — text, images, and links are click-to-edit; save commits changes straight to GitHub.

Swap in your own content, connect your projects, and you have a polished portfolio live in minutes.
name: klar-portfolio
description: A dark, editorial portfolio built for designers and developers who want their work to speak first and loudest. Zero build tools — just semantic HTML, scoped CSS, and vanilla JavaScript that works the moment you open it. Single-page flow from hero to contact, dark and light themes with an instant toggle, scroll-reveal animations via IntersectionObserver, and click-to-edit in Klar with saves committed straight to GitHub.
